# Trenith Tools

> Free private file utilities and BYOK AI workflows built by Trenith Technologies Private Limited (CIN U62099TS2026PTC216554) for India and worldwide.

Canonical global site: https://tools.trenith.com
India regional site: https://tools.trenith.in

## Start here
- /tools — searchable directory of every working tool
- /tools/metadata-remover — local metadata inspection, removal and verification
- /tools/audio-joiner — ordered file/folder joining with large-job streaming
- /tools/audio-converter — private MP3, WAV, FLAC, Ogg, Opus and M4A/AAC conversion
- /tools/audio-trimmer — exact time-range cutting with WAV output
- /tools/serp-snippet-preview — free on-device SERP snippet and meta length preview
- /tools/keyword-density-analyzer — free on-device keyword density, readability and question analysis
- /guides/convert-audio-formats-in-browser — audio format and quality guidance
- /status — capability, engine and practical-dependency matrix for every tool
- /changelog — verified product release notes and RSS feed
- /guides — practical file privacy, audio, PDF and BYOK explanations
- /connections — session-first BYOK connection vault
- /studio — real provider request workspace
- /privacy — global data handling and rights notice
- /security — architecture and reporting

## Capability labels
- Processed on your device: selected source files stay in the visitor's browser for the operation.
- Public web source: a Trenith route inspects a user-authorized public URL for exposed audio links.
- Uses your API key: the visitor connects an external provider account; provider privacy, terms, quotas and charges apply.

## Important facts
- Trenith Tools has no subscription price or artificial file-count quota. Device capacity, codec support, free storage and individual file health are practical limits.
- Large audio jobs stream to a user-selected disk destination in compatible desktop browsers. Files rejected by native browser decoding are retried with a locally loaded FFmpeg compatibility engine.
- Trenith does not sell personal data, file contents, BYOK keys, prompts or outputs.
- The metadata remover supports ExifTool-compatible formats but cannot guarantee removal of proprietary or visible traces.
- The public source scanner does not bypass authentication, DRM or platform access controls.
- Provider-dependent features require a compatible user-owned key; no generation credits are bundled.
